nasb.text: As He was getting into the boat, the man who had been demon-possessed was imploring Him that he might accompany Him.

esv.text: As he was getting into the boat, the man who had been possessed with demons begged him that he might be with him.

cnv.text: 耶穌上船的時候，那被鬼附過的人來求他，要和他在一起。

ccb.text: 耶稣上了船准备离开的时候，那被鬼附过的人恳求耶稣让他随行。

csbs.text: 耶稣上船的时候，那曾被鬼魔附身的人恳求他，要与他在一起。
